generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax and type errors without altering the underlying AADL architecture.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations when AGREE reports type errors.
Ensure AGREE contracts are contained within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing new AADL architecture to fix AGREE contract errors.
Do not attempt to resolve type errors by modifying the AADL model; focus on the AGREE contract itself.
